description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-drawer filing cabinet with a dark brown wooden finish and a flat black top. The front face features fifteen small drawers arranged in three rows and five columns, each equipped with a metallic label pull handle. The sides and back are plain and solid, lacking any decorative or functional features. The handles on the drawers are metallic and likely include integrated label holders for easy identification. The cabinet is robust and boxy, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty storage in an organized manner. Its overall appearance is utilitarian, making it suitable for environments where efficient document or item storage is required.
description: A dark brown, rectangular filing cabinet with fifteen small drawers, each featuring a metallic label pull handle. The design is sturdy and utilitarian, ideal for organized storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing all fifteen drawers with metallic label pull handles and label holders.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, featureless side panel of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid, featureless side panel.
